name: 3 in 1 Apple Tree 7G
notes: This 3-in-1 Apple tree has three delightful varieties. Honeycrisp, Gala, and Gold Rush are grafted onto one rootstock. Delicate spring blooms and green foliage grace this tree. Ripens late summer through fall. Self-pollinating. Sun Light: Full Sun Mature Height:10'H x 10'W

name: Firestorm Apple Tree 7G
notes: Firestorm Apple Tree 7G The Firestorm Apple Tree is a great apple for fresh eating. Crisp and juicy bright red fruit. The fruit stores well - up to 6 months. Cross-pollinate for best fruit production. Similar to Honeycrisp apple, but the fruit is bright red. Sun Exposure: Full Sun

name: Freedom Apple Tree 7G
notes: The Freedom Apple Tree has exceptional disease resistance! This vigorous tree has a lovely spreading nature. Large bright-red fruit with a juicy, tender flesh, excellent for fresh eating, cider, juicing, and cooking. Pollinator required. Sun Exposure: Full sun. Mature Height: 12-15' H x 12-15' W

name: Granny Smith Apple Tree 7G
notes: The Granny Smith Apple Tree is a semi dwarf tree that produces medium-sized crisp apples that are sweet and tart. They are often used in baking due to their high acidity and the ability to hold their form. Store up to 6 monthsmid season bloomer. Sun Exposure: Full Sun Mature Height: 12-15'H x 12-15'W

name: Hat Trick Espalier Apple Tree 7G
notes: The Hat Trick Espalier Apple Tree is a self-pollinating fruit tree that produces Honeycrisp, Sweet sixteen, and Zestar apples. Blooms are pink and white with green foliage. Sun Exposure: Full Sun Mature Height: 16-18'H x 16-18'W

name: Honeycrisp Apple Tree 7G
notes: MSRP

name: Honeycrisp Espalier Apple Tree 1.5"
notes: In late August, the semi dwarf Honeycrisp Espalier Apple Tree produces large, crisp, juicy apples with an excellent sweet-tart flavor. Try adding a slice of crispy apple to your burger. The apples store up to 7 months if kept cool. Late season bloomer. Sun Exposure: Full Sun Mature Height: 12-15'H x 12-15'W

name: Red Delicious Apple Tree 7G
notes: The semi dwarf Red Delicious Apple Tree produces crisp, medium to large-sized apples in mid-September. Their rich sweet flavor is excellent for eating fresh, in salads or sauces. Store for one to two months. Late season bloomer. Sun Exposure: Full Sun Mature Height: 12-15'H x 12-15'W

name: Red Fuji Apple Tree 7G
notes: This semi-dwarf Red Fuji Apple Tree produces crispy apples in late October. They have a mildly sweet flavor with a hint of honey and citrus. These apples are suitable for eating fresh, making sauces, roasting, or baking. They can be stored for up to six months. This is a late-season bloomer. Sun Exposure: Full Sun Mature Height: 12-15'H x 12-15'W

name: Royal Gala Apple Tree 7G
notes: In late August, the semi-dwarf Royal Gala Apple Tree bears medium-sized apples with a sweet and tart flavor and snaps with juiciness. These apples are excellent when eaten fresh and also great for baking. Recommended pollinators are Red or Golden Delicious. The tree is a late-season bloomer. Sun Exposure: Full Sun Mature Height: 12-15'H x 12-15'W

name: September Wonder Fuji Apple Tree 7G
notes: The September Wonder Fuji Apple Tree has an earlier harvest season, up to six weeks earlier. It is cold-hardy and requires a pollinator. Sun Exposure: Full Sun Mature Height: 8-10'H x 8-10'W

name: River Birch Clump 1.25"
notes: River Birch Clump 1.25" Light drooping branches give an airy effect to these rapid growers. Buff colored bark peels to reveal a lighter inner bark. Green leaves, with double toothed margins, turn yellow in fall. Loves moist soil and is heat tolerant. Full sun to part shade. 40-60'H x 40-60'W MSRP

name: River Birch Clump 1.5"
notes: River Birch Clump 1.5" The River Birch Clump, often referred to as the water birch, is a native tree known for its rapid growth and airy, drooping branches. The buff-colored bark peels away to reveal a lighter inner bark, ranging from cinnamon brown to parchment, creating a captivating winter display. The green leaves, edged with double-toothed margins, turn a brilliant golden-yellow in the fall. This tree thrives in moist soil, is heat-tolerant, and resistant to bronze birch borer, making it an excellent candidate for up-lighting. Sun Exposure: Full Sun to Partial Shade

notes: Golden Globe Gingko Tree 2" Dense and fast-growing Ginkgo with a full crown at youth that matures to a broad rounded crown. Brilliant yellow color in Fall. Male variety that does not produce fruit. 45' x 30' MSRP

name: Jade Butterfly Ginkgo 5G
notes: Options:

name: Magyar Ginkgo 1.5"
notes: Magyar Ginkgo 1.5" Magyar features distinctive two-lobed, somewhat leathery, fan-shaped, rich green leaves. In the fall, the foliage turns a uniform and very showy bright, golden yellow. Full sun. 40-60'H x 20-30'W MSRP

name: Magyar Ginkgo 1.75"
notes: Magyar Ginkgo 1.75" Magyar features distinctive two-lobed, somewhat leathery, fan-shaped, rich green leaves. In the fall, the foliage turns a uniform and very showy bright, golden yellow. Full sun. 40-60'H x 20-30'W MSRP

name: Mariken Ginko 5G
notes: Mariken Ginko 5G Mariken stays very small and boasts spreading branches loaded with a dense arrangement of foliage. It has beautiful fan-shaped green leaves turning bright yellow in fall. Full sun. 6'H x 6'W MSRP

name: Mariken Ginko Standard 10G
notes: Mariken Ginko Standard 10G This Mariken has been grafted onto a standard stem. It stays very small and boasts spreading branches loaded with a dense arrangement of foliage. It has beautiful fan-shaped green leaves turning bright yellow in fall. Full sun. 6'H x 6'W MSRP

name: Presidential Gold Ginkgo 1.5"
notes: Outstanding in both the nursery row and the landscape, this seedless cultivar may set the new standard among Ginkgos. Selected by Dr. Michael Dirr, it has a strong central leader and full branching when young, then develops a dense upright crown when mature. MSRP Options:

name: Princeton Sentry Ginkgo 3-4'
notes: Princeton Sentry Ginkgo 3-4' This fruitless Ginkgo cultivar is also pest-free. It has chartreuse, fan-shaped leaves that flutter in the breeze. In the fall the foliage turns a lovely flaxen yellow. This beautiful landscape specimen has a narrow columnar habit. Sun to partial shade. 40-50'H x 20-30'W MSRP

name: Sky Tower Ginkgo 5'
notes: Sky Tower Ginkgo 5' A dense, upright slow growing Ginkgo that has rich green summer foliage that gives way to golden yellows in the fall. 15-20' H x 8-12' W. Sun. MSRP

name: Sky Tower Ginkgo 5'
notes: Sky Tower Ginkgo 5' Sky Tower has a dense, upright habit. This slow grower boasts rich green summer leaves followed by a beautiful golden yellow in the fall. Full Sun

name: Golden Rain Tree 10G
notes: Golden Rain Tree 10G The Golden Rain Tree has a rounded habit that produces clustered yellow flowers in late June. Its green leaves change to yellow in the fall. Sun Exposure: Full Sun

name: Golden Rain Tree 5G
notes: Golden Rain Tree 5G The Golden Rain Tree has a rounded habit that produces clustered yellow flowers in late June. Its green leaves change to yellow in the fall. Sun Exposure: Full Sun

name: American Hornbeam (2")
notes: American Hornbeam (2") Reddish-purple new foliage matures to dark green. In fall the leaves turn shades of yellow, orange, purple or red. Attracts songbirds and beautiful tiger swallowtail butterflies. Sun to partial shade. 20-35' H x 20-35'W MSRP

name: American Hornbeam (2.5")
notes: American Hornbeam (2.5") Eastern U.S. native also known as Ironwood and Musclewood; names inspired by the smooth, gray, irregularly fluted trunk. A widely adapted small tree with outstanding fall color, excellent for naturalistic plantings. Fall Color: Yellow to bright orange red Height: 25'

name: Columnar Hornbeam (1.5")
notes: Columnar Hornbeam (1.5") The Columnar Hornbeam is a dense deciduous tree known for its strong central leader and distinctive, narrowly upright, columnar growth habit. This tree is ideal for creating privacy screens or adding vertical interest to a landscape. Its uniform shape and tidy appearance make it a popular choice for formal gardens and urban settings. Sun Exposure: Full Sun

name: Columnar Hornbeam (1.75")
notes: Columnar Hornbeam (1.75") Hornbeam is a dense deciduous tree with a strong central leader and a narrowly upright and columnar growth habit. Full sun. 35'H x 15'W MSRP

name: Columnar Hornbeam (15 Gal)
notes: Columnar Hornbeam (15 Gal) Columnar Hornbeam is a striking deciduous tree with a strong central leader and an elegantly narrow, upright form. Perfect for adding vertical structure to gardens or lining driveways, its dense foliage provides a refined, formal look. This low-maintenance tree thrives in both full sun and partial shade, making it versatile for various landscape designs. Whether used as a privacy screen or a standout specimen, the Columnar Hornbeam is a reliable and attractive choice. Sun Exposure: Full Sun

name: Columnar Hornbeam (2.5")
notes: Columnar Hornbeam (2.5") Hornbeam is a dense deciduous tree with a strong central leader and a narrowly upright and columnar growth habit. Full sun. 35'H x 15'W MSRP

notes: Columnar Hornbeam (3") Hornbeam is a dense deciduous tree with a strong central leader and a narrowly upright and columnar growth habit. Full sun. 35'H x 15'W MSRP

notes: Columnar Hornbeam (7 Gal) Hornbeam is a dense deciduous tree with a strong central leader and a narrowly upright and columnar growth habit. Full sun. 35'H x 15'W MSRP

name: Columnar Hornbeam 2"
notes: Columnar Hornbeam 2" The Columnar Hornbeam is a versatile and hardy deciduous tree with a strong, upright growth habit. Its narrow, columnar form makes it ideal for tight spaces, where its dense canopy offers privacy and shade without taking up much horizontal space. This tree's formal appearance is well-suited for urban environments, where it can be used to create elegant borders or impressive avenues. Sun Exposure: Full Sun

name: Emerald Avenue Hornbeam (25 Gal)
notes: Emerald Avenue Hornbeam (25 Gal) Emerald Avenue has a stout trunk, strong central leader, and sturdy branch arrangement. It is a vigorous and easy grower. During the dog days of summer, it maintains healthy deep green foliage, thanks to its superior heat tolerance. Full sun. 40'H x 30'W MSRP

name: Frans Fontaine Hornbeam (1.5")
notes: Frans Fontaine Hornbeam (1.5") Frans Fontaine Hornbeam features glossy, forest green foliage on a narrow, upright habit. In the fall, its leaves turn a striking gold, adding vibrant color to your landscape. The smooth gray bark provides a unique texture and visual interest during the winter months. Sun Exposure: Full Sun

name: Frans Fontaine Hornbeam (15 Gal)
notes: Frans Fontaine Hornbeam (15 Gal) Frans Fontaine Hornbeam has glossy, forest green foliage on a narrow, upright habit. In the fall the leaves turn an outstanding gold. The smooth gray bark adds an interesting dimension to the landscape in the winter. Sun Exposure: Full Sun

name: Frans Fontaine Hornbeam (2")
notes: Frans Fontaine Hornbeam (2") The Frans Fontaine Hornbeam features glossy, forest green foliage on a narrow, upright habit that makes it a striking addition to any landscape. In the fall, its leaves transform into a stunning golden hue, adding seasonal beauty. The smooth gray bark stands out in the winter, offering an interesting texture and visual appeal even during the colder months. Sun Exposure: Full Sun

notes: The Kentucky Coffee Tree features an oval-shaped habit with pinkish-tinged young leaves that mature into a striking blue-green in the summer. As autumn approaches, the foliage transforms into a brilliant yellow, adding vibrant seasonal interest to your landscape. This tree is both resilient and adaptable, making it a stunning addition to gardens and urban spaces alike. Its unique foliage and seasonal color shifts offer year-round beauty and charm. Sun Exposure: Full Sun Mature Height; 75 feet

Its elegant structure and dynamic leaf color make it a standout choice for any garden. Sun Exposure: Full Sun

In early summer, cloud-like green flower clusters cover the plant, and these turn into the pink "smoke" plumes that earn the plant its name. Naturally grows with a dense, oval shape that's ideal for adding a spot of bright color to partially shaded or sunny areas.
